name: Twice-Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup shredded cheese or crumbled blue cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the potatoes clean.
2. Prick several times with a fork.
3. Bake at 350°F for 60 minutes, turning the potatoes after 30 minutes of baking.
4. Let cool slightly.
5. Cut off a 1-inch strip from the top of each potato.
6. Carefully scoop out the potato pulp, leaving a 1/4-inch shell intact.
7. Mash the pulp.
8. Combine the mashed pulp and remaining ingredients.
9. Spoon the mixture into the potato shells.
10. Place on a cookie sheet.
11. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 15 minutes or until heated through and cheese is melted.
